description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a predominantly red exterior and a streamlined, angular design. The fuselage is narrow and tapers sharply at the nose, with a long, pointed probe or pitot tube extending forward. The wings are mid-mounted, straight, and slightly swept back, featuring small winglets at the tips and additional aerodynamic surfaces beneath. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy, positioned just ahead of the engine section, and appears to be a single-seat configuration. The rear houses a large, exposed jet engine with a circular intake and exhaust, and the tail section is minimalistic, with small vertical and horizontal stabilizers. The overall appearance suggests a high-performance, possibly experimental or sci-fi-inspired aircraft.
description: A red, angular, single-seat airplane with a mid-mounted swept wing, exposed rear jet engine, and a streamlined, futuristic design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, central cockpit canopy, and symmetrical mid-mounted wings with winglets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long nose probe, cockpit placement, underwing details, and the large rear jet engine.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the circular jet exhaust, minimal tail surfaces, and the symmetry of the wings and stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular wing design, engine housing, and aerodynamic features.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, slightly swept wings featuring small upward-angled winglets and underwing aerodynamic surfaces.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with a prominent circular intake and exhaust.
attribute_tail_design: Minimalistic tail with a single vertical stabilizer and small horizontal stabilizers in a conventional layout.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear, though partially obscured.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage ahead of the engine.
